since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +2.24% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.67%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.39%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.18%, ISRG +5.71%, AAPL +4.76%, ADBE +4.27%, ADBE +4.27%. Laggards: TER -13.39%, KLAC -11.33%, AMBA -11.27%, CEVA -11.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.08% at $160.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
